30.reason: The flag variable is never set to 1 inside the loop, so this condition will always be true after the first iteration, causing the sorting to stop prematurely.

20.reason: The variable 'flag' is initialized to 0 but never updated to 1 inside the inner loop when a swap occurs. This causes the outer sorting loop to break after the first iteration regardless of whether swaps happened, resulting in an incomplete sort.
